name: AmpliFi Alien Router and MeshPoint
title: AmpliFi Alien Router and MeshPoint
title_extended: AmpliFi Alien Router and MeshPoint – WiFi 6 Mesh System
short_description: AmpliFi Alien Router + MeshPoint kit, Wi-Fi 6 standard, 4x4 MIMO 2.4GHz, 8x8 MIMO 5GHz, 5x10/100/1000Mbps ports
description: AmpliFi Alien Router + MeshPoint kit, Wi-Fi 6 standard, 4x4 MIMO 2.4GHz, 8x8 MIMO 5GHz, 5x10/100/1000Mbps ports

detailed_description.heading: Revolutionary Connectivity Combination
detailed_description.text: Dive into cutting-edge home networking with the AmpliFi Alien Router—a dual-band Wi-Fi 6 powerhouse meticulously designed for exceptional performance. This router is crafted to deliver advanced functionality, going beyond typical routers in its capability and efficiency. With a sleek design, this router not only elevates the aesthetic of your home but also introduces a substantial 4x increase in network capacity and a remarkable 2x boost in coverage compared to its predecessor in the series. It also intelligently reduces battery drain in mobile devices, ensuring an energy-efficient online experience.

detailed_description.heading: Elevated Connectivity Experience
detailed_description.text: Expand your home connectivity with the AmpliFi HD Mesh Point. This device introduces mesh Wi-Fi technology, transforming your living space into a high-performance wireless network. The system deploys interconnected nodes, each functioning as a mini router to intelligently extend and strengthen the Wi-Fi signal throughout your home, eliminating dead zones for a consistent and robust connection.

detailed_description.heading: Flexible Interfaces for Seamless Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The AmpliFi Alien stands out not only for its powerful capabilities but also for its flexibility, making it a versatile solution for modern connectivity needs. Boasting a single Gigabit internet interface, an internal power supply, and an integrated LAN switch with 4 Gigabit Ethernet ports, it bridges the gap between wired and wireless connectivity. This unique combination provides the convenience of extending Gigabit Ethernet into any room without the need for intricate wire installations, catering to the demands of contemporary households seeking both performance and adaptability. Enhance your home office setup or ensure a seamless multimedia experience in various rooms — the AmpliFi Alien's flexibility opens up diverse use cases for a streamlined networking solution. Additionally, its automatic turn-off feature adds a layer of convenience, allowing for a hassle-free and energy-efficient operation tailored to your specific usage patterns.

detailed_description.heading: Simplicity with Rich Controls
detailed_description.text: Harness the capabilities of the user-friendly yet feature-rich AmpliFi app for a smooth setup of the AmpliFi Alien. This app empowers you with intuitive controls and detailed statistics, placing the control of your network directly in your hands. From quick configurations to comprehensive insights, the AmpliFi app simplifies network management, ensuring a personalized and hassle-free experience.

detailed_description.heading: Expansive Network Reach
detailed_description.text: The AmpliFi Alien excels thanks to a smart integration of specifications in its design. Operating on a spectrum of wireless standards, including 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax (Wi-Fi 6), this router ensures a forward-looking and optimized performance. Powered by a Quad-Core Cortex A53 chipset clocked at 2.2 GHz and boasting 1 GB of RAM, it guarantees swift and efficient processing for a responsive user experience. For seamless connectivity, the AmpliFi Alien features 5 Ethernet ports, providing a versatile solution for wired connections in modern homes. These ports cater to devices requiring stable and high-speed wired connections, such as gaming consoles, smart TVs, or desktop computers.

comments.name: Wifi
comments.text:
Very nice and reliable router. The display on the main router is one of a kind and really nice. The overall performance is good, but nothing a cheaper product from other vendors can’t do. 
The product support is very very good! I had an issue regarding random restarts and they helped me to solve this problem. Now everything runs very smooth.
The only downside is, that there is no logging view and the support log files are encrypted so that only the manufacturers support can read them.
